title: Financial Payout
description:
A single payout-related record.

A record can represent either:
- an actual payout sent to the merchant (`type = PAYOUT`)
- a deduction applied against merchant funds for a refund, chargeback, direct debit return, or balance adjustment

id.description: Unique identifier of the payout-related record.

amount.description: Amount of the payout or deduction in major units.

date.description: Payout date associated with the record, in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.

currency.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code of the payout.

fee.description: Fee amount associated with the payout record, in major units.

status.description: Merchant-facing outcome of the payout record.

reference.description: Processor or payout reference associated with the record.

transaction_code.description: Transaction code of the original sale associated with the payout or deduction.
